title: In Hostile Hearing, Democrats Accuse Hegseth of Misleading Public on Iran War Progress
snippet: First congressional hearing since war began. War cost $25 billion. Rep. John Garamendi: 'Secretary Hegseth, you have been lying to the American public about this war from day one.' Hegseth called Democrats 'biggest adversary.' Hegseth declined to provide victory timeline or definition. Pentagon munitions drawdown criticized.
tag_reason: First Hegseth hearing since war began, $25B cost first disclosed, new confrontation
